_comment: Claude Desktop MCP configuration showing how to insert the proxy in front of a real server.

filesystem-monitored._comment_: Proxy wrapping the official MCP filesystem server. Claude talks to proxy.py; proxy forwards to the real server.

filesystem-monitored-attack._comment_: Same proxy, different label for an attack run. Swap the label to distinguish sessions in analyze.py.

filesystem-direct._comment_: The real server with no proxy — use this as a control when you want unmonitored traffic.
